description: 88-level with multiple values: VALUE 'SAT' 'SUN' should be true when base is 'SUN'
notes: WS-DAY='SUN' matches the WEEKEND 88-level (VALUE 'SAT' 'SUN'). 88-level with multiple values is flagged for manual review in the support matrix. This is extremely common in banking COBOL for status codes, day-of-week checks, account type flags.
